CopyGOAT: Auto Text Expander for Google Chrome
No. #1 Text Expander - Create custom keyboard shortcuts to expand and replace text as you type.

Let's be honest about traditional text expanders. They are built to save you time, but they often end up giving you a new, frustrating job: memorizing dozens of obscure keyboard shortcuts. When you are rushing to reply to a client or send an outreach email, trying to remember if your shortcut was "/thanks", "/thx", or "/ty" causes cognitive overload. Instead of typing faster, you freeze, search your memory, or end up typing the whole message manually anyway.
CopyGOAT was built to fix this exact problem. It is a text expander that forgives your memory.

With CopyGOAT, forgetting a shortcut is perfectly fine. You do not need a photographic memory to use your templates. Just type your trigger key (like "/") and start typing a related word. A smart, visual suggestion menu instantly appears right at your cursor. You can see your snippets, search them on the fly, and insert them with a single keystroke. It is fast, visual, and completely stress-free.

Whether you are in customer support, sales, recruiting, or simply tired of typing the same email responses over and over, CopyGOAT adapts to your workflow with powerful, professional features.

Core Features:

Smart Auto-Suggest Menu
Never memorize a shortcut again. Type your prefix, and a sleek dropdown menu appears right where you are typing. Browse, filter, and select your canned responses without breaking your focus.

Dynamic Smart Variables
Do not just paste static text. Make your snippets intelligent. Automatically insert today's date, your current clipboard content, or the URL of the page you are currently viewing.

Custom Fill-in-the-Blank Placeholders
Need to personalize an email? Create custom variables like {{First Name}} or {{Price}}. When you trigger the snippet, CopyGOAT will prompt you to fill in these exact details before pasting the final, polished message.

Advanced Rich Text Formatting
Your templates should not look like plain text robots. The built-in editor allows you to add bold text, bulleted lists, hyperlinks, custom text colors, and even images directly into your snippets.

Domain-Specific Snippets
Keep your workspace perfectly organized. You can set specific templates to only appear on certain websites. Show your support templates only on Zendesk, and your networking outreach templates only on LinkedIn.

Seamless Google Drive Sync
If you work across multiple computers, your templates should follow you. Connect your Google Drive once, and your entire snippet library will silently sync in the background. No manual file transfers required.

Secure Data Export and Import
Have full control over your data. Export your entire snippet library as a JSON file for local backup or share it with your team members to standardize your company's communication.

Privacy First Approach
Your templates, emails, and snippets are your private data. CopyGOAT does not store your snippets on proprietary cloud servers. Your data lives locally on your browser and syncs securely through your own personal Google Drive account. 

Stop wasting mental energy trying to remember abbreviations. Upgrade your typing workflow with a visual snippet manager that works the way your brain actually does.

A new tab page replacement with visual bookmarks and tab management, built for how people actually use the web.

TabStack is a new tab page replacement built for how people actually use the web — not just long-term storage of bookmarks and tabs, but active, flexible organization for current work and research.

• Ephemeral & Task-Based Organization: Some links are temporary. Some you use every day. Some are archived. TabStack handles them all - daily tools, weekly projects, or random rabbit holes.

• Decluttered browser, decluttered mind: TabStack is your daily tools hub. It keeps you sane by reducing tab overload and link clutter. 

• Effortless workflow: It lives in the new tab page, lets you drag current tabs into groups easily, and adapts to how you actually work. Minimal friction and no overthinking.


✨ Features: ✨

📋 Visual Bookmark Dashboard – Transforms the New Tab page into a clean, visual dashboard of how you use the browser.

⚡ Save Tabs Instantly – You know all those precious tabs you've been saving for years but just can't bring yourself to close? Dump them all into a new group with one click. Or selectively drag them into any group. No more cluttered windows and lost research.

📂 Folder, Group & Page Organization – Structure your bookmarks with flexible folders and colour-coded groups. Create unlimited pages to house your groups.

📥 Import & Export - Import bookmarks from any browser, or from Toby. Export bookmarks in universal format. 

🦋 Modern, Minimal Design – Designed for clarity and usability with a fresh, friendly interface. Grid and list views. Dark mode by default.

🆓 Free to Use – All features are available without a subscription.

🥇 Competing with the Best: combines the best features of Toby and Raindrop.io, and goes further by adding new features (📂 folders!) Unlike Toby, the free version is fully functional (and always will be!)

🙅 No gimmicky AI integration!

Pocket Pet: Save Links, Sessions & Notes
A tiny browser companion. Save links, tab sessions, notes & reminders. Sync across devices.

Meet your Pocket Pet: a tiny companion that lives in the corner of every page.

Save links, notes, sessions, and reminders without leaving the page. A tiny companion lives in the corner and helps you stay organized. Your pet reacts when you save things, greets you by name, and makes your browser feel a little more like home.

NEW IN 1.9
• Rich notes — bold, headings, lists, code, quotes (type / for a block menu)
• Recurring reminders — daily, weekly, monthly, with day-of-week control
• Quiet hours + custom snooze + 4 pet voice tones
• Web app at getpocketpet.com — open from any browser, install as an app on phones

WHAT YOU CAN DO
• Save links with one click or right-click — organized with tags and search
• Save all open tabs as a session — restore them anytime with one click
• Write quick notes that auto-save as you type
• Set nudge reminders — your pet delivers them with a speech bubble
• Drag your pet anywhere — it remembers its spot on each website
• Name your companion and watch it use your name in greetings and reactions

CUSTOMIZE EVERYTHING
• 12+ hand-drawn pets — sloth, cat, panda, penguin, fox, owl, duck, capybara, axolotl, frog, and more
• 5 themes that change how everything feels — Cream, Dark, Ocean, Rose, Forest
• 5 elemental auras — Fire, Water, Wind, Earth, Cosmic
• Resize your pet to fit your screen
• Choose when greetings appear — morning, afternoon, evening, night

SIGN IN TO UNLOCK MORE
• Sync links, notes, sessions, and nudges across all your devices
• Free forever. Your email is used for sync only.

PRIVATE BY DEFAULT
• Everything is stored on your device — nothing leaves your browser unless you choose to sync
• No tracking, no ads, no data collection
• Pet never reads or accesses your browsing history
• Sign-in is completely optional

KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS
• Alt+S — Save the current page instantly
• Alt+Y — Toggle your pet's bubble
• Esc — Close the bubble

WORKS EVERYWHERE
• Appears as a draggable companion on every website
• Falls back to a toolbar popup on restricted pages (New Tab, Chrome settings, Web Store)
• Lightweight — no background processes, no performance impact

Built for people who want a calmer, warmer browser experience — with real utility underneath.
Effortlessly scrape web data with Crawlr. Extract data, export, schedule alerts, and manage your data with ease.

Crawlr is a powerful web scraping extension designed to help you effortlessly extract and manage data from websites. Whether you need to collect product information, track content changes, or export data for analysis, Crawlr makes the process simple and efficient.

Key Features:

• One-Click Crawling: Easily crawl and scrape data from any webpage with a single click. Crawlr highlights content elements for seamless data extraction.
• Content Highlighting: Visualize scraped elements with intuitive color-coded highlights, ensuring you capture exactly what you need.
• Instantly Export or Schedule Exports: Instantly export to Excel and schedule automatic reports to your preferred format (CSV or Excel) and receive data on your schedule. Choose daily full exports or alert-based notifications for changes.
• Flexible Data Management: Customize column names and configure alerts to receive notifications for specific data changes. Perfect for tracking price updates, content changes, and more.
• User-Friendly Interface: Enjoy a clean, intuitive interface that makes web scraping easy for everyone, from beginners to advanced users.
How to Use Crawlr:

Install Crawlr: Add the Crawlr extension to your Chrome browser.
1. Crawl a Page: Navigate to the webpage you want to scrape and click the "Crawl This Page!" button.
2. View Scraped Data: Review the highlighted elements and extracted data in the extension's popup.
3. Build Export: Crawlr will extract all data from the webpage, from there you must specify what is of importance to you. Use the checkboxes to select what you want in your export and input the column names as well.
4. Instant Export or Schedule Exports: Instantly export to Excel or specify your export preferences and schedule your report.
5. Manage and Monitor: Customize alerts and column names to keep track of important data changes.

Crawlr is the perfect tool for data enthusiasts, researchers, e-commerce professionals, and anyone needing reliable and efficient web scraping capabilities. Get started with Crawlr today and take control of your web data like never before!

Privacy and Compliance:

Crawlr respects your privacy and data security. We do not collect or store any personal information. All data is processed locally within your browser, and you have full control over your exported data.
Stay organized and productive with Membr's rich note-taking editor, AI powered summaries and secure storage.

Stay In Flow, Be More Productive
===============================
A huge portion of work already happens in the browser. And if you’re like us, you also take draft notes when studying, researching or ideating. You can do this through note-taking apps like Notion, Evernote, Google Docs and many more.

However, most of these note-taking apps interrupt *flow* by forcing you to context switch, either by opening a new browser tab or app window. With Membr for Chrome, your notes sit alongside the source content.


Why Membr Notes?
===================
- Rich editor experience with all the essentials and more. The editor offers rich formatting, task lists, drag and drop images etc. with regular updates expanding this feature set.

- Encrypted notes. We take the security of your information seriously and that’s why all your notes in Membr are stored and retrieved while encrypted. 

- It's fast. Membr runs on all browser tabs and offers single-click access to your most recent notes. 

- It works well with other apps. You can export to PDF with *Google Docs and Notion export coming soon.


FAQs
=======
1. Membr doesn't start after install?
If you are unable to start the extension immediately after install, try refreshing the browser tab(s) that you'd like to use Membr on. 

2. Do my notes sync across devices?
Yes, your notes will sync across all signed in Chrome browsers that have the extension installed.

3. Is there a mobile app?
The mobile app will launch later in 2022.

Set post limits on social media feeds, and get reminders to take breaks. Finite helps you manage your social media usage mindfully.

We want to make the endless infinite scroll into finite, intentional sessions, by letting you set clear boundaries for your social media use.

How this extension Works:

* Finite Session: Set a limit on the number of posts you want to view in each session. Finite counts the posts as you browse, and will show a reminder when you've reached your limit, giving you a clear cue to take a break or go back to work, study, or daily life.
* Post Numbers: If you prefer something less structured, Finite also adds post numbers to your feed. It shows you how many posts you’ve read, and it could be used as exit cues as well.

PRO Features (Free Trial, No Credit Card Required):
* Keyboard Navigation: Go to the previous and next posts using keyboard shortcuts.
* Focus Mode: Dim surrounding content to help you focus on the current post.
* Custom Setup: Configure and use Finite on any webpage.

Finite isn't about eliminating social media—it’s about improving your relationship with it. 

The opposite of doomscrolling isn’t quitting social media cold turkey — it’s using social media intentionally to get valuable insights and enjoyment. With Finite, you can stay in control on your social media consumption, without getting lost in the infinite scroll.

Try Finite Session today and reclaim your focus from doomscrolling!

Learn more about Finite at https://www.itsfinite.com/
See the blog posts at https://www.itsfinite.com/blog
Meet Finite Sessions: https://www.itsfinite.com/blog/meet-finite-session-turn-doomscrolling-into-mindful-sessions
Better Chat: Chat Power-Ups for Google Meet™
Supercharge your Google Meet™ experience with Better Chat, the ultimate Chrome extension for enhancing chat functionality in your…

Supercharge your Google Meet™ experience with Better Chat, the ultimate Chrome extension for enhancing chat functionality in your meetings! Whether you're a frequent user or just want to take your Meet experience to the next level, Better Chat offers a wide range of features designed to improve chat interaction, streamline communication, and provide advanced tools for both casual and professional use. 🚀

Key Features:
 - Enhanced Chat Interface 💬
    Upgrade to a feature-rich chat window that includes persistent chat history, even for late joiners.
 - Dark Mode for Chat 🌙
    Easily switch to dark mode for more comfort.
 - Auto Mic Muting 🎤
    Automatically mute your mic when entering a meeting.
 - Auto Camera Disabling 📷
    Automatically turn off your camera when you join a meeting for privacy.
 - Auto Join Meetings ⏱️
    Auto join scheduled meetings at the exact start time, or a few minutes later.
 - Transcription Tab 📝
    Scroll back through full realtime meeting transcriptions.
 - Lobby Notifier 🔔
    Get a notification chime whenever someone joins the call, ensuring you never miss the start of a meeting.
 - Reactions to Messages 👍😂
    React to and see reactions on messages for more interactive chats.
 - Mention Users and Reply to Messages ✉️
    Quote and reply to messages for clearer communication.
 - Image Sharing in Chat 🖼️
    Now you can send and receive images directly in the chat.
 - GIF Search and Send 🎉
    Easily search for and send GIFs in the chat, adding a fun and expressive way to communicate.
 - Attendee Shuffling 🔄
    Pick one person from the attendee list or shuffle the entire participants list—perfect for meetings where everyone needs to take turns sharing, such as standups and retrospectives.

Why Better Chat?
Better Chat is continuously updated with new features and improvements based on user feedback and extensive testing. The extension is designed to seamlessly integrate into your Google Meet™ experience, adding powerful new tools while maintaining ease of use. 🔧✨

Latest Updates:
Image Sharing in Chat 🖼️
Share visuals and screenshots instantly during meetings!
Rich Text Editor features 🆕: Type in Bold, Italic, and Strikethrough text!
Bug Fixes & Improvements 🔄: Regular updates ensure stability and performance, with the latest version fixing various bugs and adding new features based on user requests.

Join the growing community of Better Chat users and transform the way you interact in Google Meet™. Install now and discover what Better Chat can do for you! 🌟

Stay tuned for more exciting features and improvements in upcoming updates!

Check Managed logs device information to an unauthenticated data sink.

Check Managed will send logs to an unauthenticated data sink. The extension must be force installed by the admin. 

Sample DataSink in AppsScript with Google Sheets and BigQuery configurations. https://bit.ly/datasink

Managed JSON Settings:

  {"posturl":{"Value":""},
  "schemaurl":{"Value":""},
  "ipurl":{"Value":""},
  "period": {"Value":5},
  "frequency":{"Value":2},
  "tabactivity": {"Value":false},
  "debug": {"Value":false}}

posturl: The url to send an unauthenticated POST request of the data array. 
schemaurl: The url to send the BigQuery schema
ipurl: The url for a GET request to retrieve the IP and Geolocation, ie http://ip-api.com/json/
period: The amount of minutes to wait before sending the collected cache of data to the post url.
frequency: The amount of minutes to wait before requesting device information
tabactivity: Sets to list to changes in tabs and records. Could be more noise than needed
debug: If true sends the logging information to the browser console log

Starter Data Sink: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12Zy7OrwjhBBQlTS2GmrTCbge5WX8YEBUUaf4YVQm1Rs/copy

Data Gathered:
Agent: UserAgent information
archName: Architecture
Chrome Version: Calculated from the UserAgent
City: From the IPurl
Country: From the IPurl
countryCode: From the IPurl
Email: Authenticated user email
User id: Authenticated user id
Annotated Location  (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the admin console annotation
Device AssetId (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the admin console annotation
Device Hostname  (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the admin console annotation
Device Serial number  (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the Device
Directory ID  (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the admin console device policy
IP: From the IPurl
IPv4 (if available, only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the device
IPv6 (if available, only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the device
Ismanaged: Calculated boolean based on if there is a serial number
Isp: From the IPurl
Latitude: From the IPurl
Longitude: From the IPurl
Mac address (only for managed ChomeOS devices): From the device
Modelname: From the chrome.system.cpu
Numberofprocessors: From the chrome.system.cpu
Operating system: From the User Agent
Platform:  From the chrome.system.cpu
Region: From the IPurl
Regionname: From the IPurl
Tabid: Tab Id
Timestamp: time of data capture
Timezone: From the IPurl
windowId: Window Id
Zip: From the IPurl


GitHub https://github.com/chromeos/check-managed-extension

The AI-Assisted Form Filler offers a revolutionary way to complete online forms such as job applications, classifieds, and test data, all with just a single click. It provides three convenient methods for users:

Document Upload: Users can upload relevant documents, and the AI will extract the necessary information to auto-fill the form fields. For example, in a job application, uploading a resume will enable the AI to populate fields related to work history and education.

Text Input: For those who prefer manual entry, users can type in the required details, and the AI will organize this information into the correct sections of the form. This method is ideal when specific, detailed information needs to be provided.

"Selling iPhone 14 Pro with 128 GB for £800. My name is Peter Pan."

Instruction-Based: Users can simply instruct the AI about the information to be filled in, and the AI will handle the rest. For instance, when creating a classified ad for selling a vehicle, providing details like the make, model, and price will prompt the AI to correctly complete the form.

Example: "Fill in the form with random data for a person from Star Wars".

Please note The current beta version of this tool primarily supports only text fields. However, we are actively working on developing improved versions that will accommodate a wider range of input fields, enhancing the tool's versatility and user experience.
Best Browser Extension For Finding Discount Codes While Shopping Online

CouponZkart: Your Ultimate Shopping Companion!

Introducing CouponZkart, your go-to solution for hassle-free savings while shopping online. This innovative Google Chrome extension, developed by CouponZkart Pvt. Ltd, is designed exclusively for retail enthusiasts.

What CouponZkart Does:

CouponZkart revolutionizes your online shopping experience by effortlessly finding coupon codes and applying the best suitable coupons with just one touch. Say goodbye to endless searches for valid discounts - CouponZkart does the hard work for you! It acts as a robot for finding coupons automatically while shopping online.

Key Features:

Automatic Coupon Application for selective shops: CouponZkart's intelligent algorithm identifies the best available coupons and applies them automatically during checkout once user clicks on 'Apply coupon' or 'Apply All Coupons', ensuring you never miss out on savings. 'Apply All Coupons' allows user to get best discount out of multiple working coupons.

Tailored for Your Favorite Shops: Enjoy automatic coupon application for your preferred stores. CouponZkart is designed to seamlessly integrate with selective shops, providing you with targeted discounts by using it's promo code search engine.

Real-Time Coupon Updates: Our extension constantly scans for the latest deals and discounts, ensuring you always have access to the most up-to-date savings.

Simplified User Experience: CouponZkart is incredibly user-friendly, requiring just a single touch to activate savings. No more tedious search of coupons or copy-pasting or manual code entry. It helps users as online deal hunter or discount code locator.

Privacy and Security: Rest easy knowing that CouponZkart adheres to stringent privacy and security standards. Your personal information is always safeguarded.
Registered users can always delete their profile from the profile page at their will. We allow user registration only from operating countries. Users from any other country may access our platform anonymously.
For more details on our data privacy policy please visit: https://www.couponzkart.com/in/content/legal

Fact check in video for Youtube and Rutube

** Description **

Fact check in video for Youtube and Rutube. Web links to external sources are used as a refutation of a fake/inaccuracy or confirmation of a fact. Registered users can rate other users' links and add their own web links. The totality of ratings form the video credibility rating and the channel trust rating.

Unfortunately, many videos contain inaccuracies and intentional deception. Video hosting sites do not provide a systematic approach to video fact-checking. The format of publishing video on video hosting sites does not allow the authors to give sufficient evidence of the facts in the published video. Comments are chaotic or disabled, and comments with links get banned. For these reasons, it is difficult to objectively and quickly assess the accuracy of the information contained in the video. “Facts and fakes” solves these problems and displays references to refutations, proofs and disputs of the facts contained in the video, as well as the video rating of the video and the overall channel rating. The overall rating of the channel characterizes its reputation, which will serve as a good motivation for video bloggers to publish carefully checked material.

** How to use "Facts and Fakes" **

( for a detailed illustrated guide, see: https://sites.google.com/view/facts-and-fakes/en/user-guide )

Under each Youtube or Rutube video, an area will appear with a table of timecodes and related web links.
Clicking on the timecode line jumps to the corresponding point in time of the video in the video player. While watching a video or manually rewinding, synchronization of the video time point and timecodes of the table is performed - the nearest timecode in the table is highlighted with a blue frame.
Links to denials of fakes and inaccuracies are marked in red, to confirmations and additions of facts - in green, to discussions - in yellow.
The heading of the table is designed as a color bar for the credibility rating of this video, where the color ratio shows the ratio of link types and ratings for them: if the table contains links to rebuttals, then the rating bar will contain red, if it contains links to evidence - green, links to disputes - yellow. Similarly, under the name of the channel, the trust rating for the channel will be shown in the form of a colored bar.
For convenience, the table with links can be collapsed/expanded by clicking on the table header, or resized by the bottom corner.

Clicking on the link will open the web page in a new tab. If for some reason the link is not available (including due to blocking) - you can use the view mode of saved Google copies by clicking the "eye" button to the right of the link. This mode is enabled in the extension settings by the "Block bypass" switch.
Some users who have added links may have entered their web page address in order to make themselves known and increase the credibility of their links - such links will have a "Vendetta" button that opens the web page of this user.
Further to the right are the ratings of this link by other users - reliability and significance on a scale from 0 to 3. Reliability means the level of trust in the information published by this link. Significance - the level of relationship, the relationship of this information to the fact being confirmed/refuted in this video fragment. The combination of these scores gives an overall unbiased score for the link and influences the rating of the video and channel.
The link table and video rating are updated in real time: links added by other users will immediately appear in your table and will be reflected in the rating. This is useful when watching "hype" - new videos that are watched by many people at the same time: already at the beginning and during viewing, you can get an idea of the quality of the video.

If you want to temporarily stop displaying information about the authenticity of the video, you can do this in the extension settings by using the "Disable/enable extension" switch.

If you want to vote for links and add your information, you will need to register with your Google account, or with any of your email and password, and be sure to read the User guide:

** User guide **

https://sites.google.com/view/facts-and-fakes/en/user-guide

** Privacy Policy **

https://sites.google.com/view/facts-and-fakes/en/privacy-policy

** "Facts and Fakes" for other browsers **

https://sites.google.com/view/facts-and-fakes/en/install 

** Support **

This extension is in the active phase of development and far from ideal. If you have any suggestions, for example for improving translations, problems or unresolved questions, you can send an email to: facts-fakes@yandex.ru . I'll try to answer as far as possible.

** Support the project (Donate)**

https://sites.google.com/view/facts-and-fakes/en/donate
https://sites.google.com/view/facts-and-fakes/en/donate-in-crypto
